Jon Waters was a knight during the reign of King Daeron II Targaryen. He was the bastard son of Lord Alyn Velaryon and Princess Elaena Targaryen.[3]

Contents

  • 1 Character
  • 2 History
  • 3 Quotes
  • 4 Family
  • 5 References

Character[ ]

Jon became a famous knight.[1]

History[ ]

Jon Waters was the bastard son of the seafarer Lord Alyn Velaryon, called "the Oakenfist", and Princess Elaena Targaryen. He had a twin sister, Jeyne Waters. Elaena had hoped to marry Alyn, but he was lost at sea.[3]

Jon's trueborn son, also a great knight, changed the family name to Longwaters to remove the taint of bastardy. His line continues until the present times.[1]

Quotes[ ]

She gave their son the bastard name of 'Waters' in honor of his father, and he grew to be a great knight.[1]

—Rennifer Longwaters to Jaime Lannister
